# reed.vonredwitz.com

> Personal developer blog by Reed von Redwitz. Posts on Deno, Fresh, TypeScript, and assorted web development topics, including a "90 days of new tech" series.

The site is built with Fresh 2.x, deployed on Deno Deploy, with server-side Umami analytics (no cookies, no client-side tracking).

## Content

- [Blog index](https://reed.vonredwitz.com/): latest posts
- [Archive](https://reed.vonredwitz.com/archive): all posts grouped by year, with tag filtering
- [RSS feed](https://reed.vonredwitz.com/blog/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://reed.vonredwitz.com/sitemap.xml)

- [About](https://reed.vonredwitz.com/about)
- [Projects](https://reed.vonredwitz.com/projects)
- [Contact](https://reed.vonredwitz.com/contact)
